function.message: Processed the next inbox note successfully. Added YAML frontmatter (OCR-style extraction) to all 8 requested finance records, preserving each original body verbatim beneath frontmatter, then deleted the processed inbox file.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request listed 8 specific finance files to run through OCR workflow. I read each target file, extracted visible metadata/line items into required invoice/bill frontmatter per finance schema, kept line order and totals consistent, preserved original body text verbatim below frontmatter, and then removed the processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
